instruction: Remove the extra marker from the balloon festival and recenter the large sun glow toward the left. A basket beneath one middle balloon should be brown, the rigging on a small distant balloon should be delicate, and the white panel lines on the middle balloon should be softly visible. Preserve all other balloons and fields.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">

      <stop offset="0.4" stop-color="#e08a7a" />
      <stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#f6b878" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#fbe2b0" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sun12" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fffae8" /><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#ffd89a" stop-opacity="0.7" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffd89a" stop-opacity="0" />

    <filter id="cloud12" x="-40%" y="-40%" width="180%" height="180%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="12" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky12)" id="download-sv_032-rect-001" />

  <circle cx="300" cy="320" r="70" fill="#fff8e6" id="download-sv_032-circle-002" />
